1.description: Credit line origination activity by year This figure depicts the time series of the number (left) and dollar volume (right) of 364-day facility originations. Panel B plots the time series of the relative number and dollar volume of originations for 364-day facilities, and 2-, 3-, 4- and 5-year credit lines as a proportion of total credit facilities originated in a given year.

2.description: Undrawn fees around Basel I This figure plots the average annual undrawn fees on short- versus long-term credit lines around Basel I. Fees are scaled to 100 in 1992.

3.description: Conditional difference between short- and long-term undrawn fees This figures plots the average annual difference between undrawn fees on short- versus long-term credit lines around Basel I estimated on the sample of credit lines with maturities up to 4 years conditional on the full set of controls in Table 3.

4.description: Undrawn fees around Basel I and Basel II This figure plots the average annual undrawn fees on short- versus long-term credit lines around Basel I and Basel II. Fees are scaled to 100 in 1992 and 2004, respectively.
